description: Engineering core standards — language, tooling, repo structure, coding conventions, dependency policy.

fixed_rules.name: TypeScript Required
fixed_rules.description: All source code must be written in TypeScript with strict mode enabled.

fixed_rules.name: Source Directory Structure
fixed_rules.description: Source code must follow the canonical directory structure: src/core/, src/cli/, src/types/, src/utils/.

fixed_rules.name: No Default Exports
fixed_rules.description: All modules must use named exports. Default exports are prohibited.

fixed_rules.name: Error Handling Discipline
fixed_rules.description: All errors must use typed error classes. Generic throw statements are prohibited.

fixed_rules.name: Dependency Allowlist Enforcement
fixed_rules.description: Only dependencies listed in the approved allowlist may be used. New dependencies require review.

configurable_rules.name: Naming Convention
configurable_rules.description: Naming convention for files, functions, and types.

configurable_rules.name: Max File Length
configurable_rules.description: Maximum recommended lines per source file.

configurable_rules.name: Import Order
configurable_rules.description: Import ordering convention: node builtins, external packages, internal modules, relative imports.
